scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),src='node_modules/lightningcss-win32-x64-msvc/lightningcss.win32-x64-msvc.node',dst='node_modules/lightningcss/lightningcss.win32-x64-msvc.node';if(fs.existsSync(src)&&!fs.existsSync(dst)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('lightningcss win32 binary copied OK');}else{console.log('lightningcss win32 binary already in place or src missing');}"
